prompt:
During the repo restructure our wholesale bakery's planning tool got split into two source trees — bake-core (shared batch arithmetic) and bake-planner (turns the order book into a purchasing list, uses bake-core) — but whoever did the split never landed the build files. There is no pom.xml anywhere: not at the root, not in either module. Set up the Maven multi-module build from scratch, then finish the two methods that came over as TODOs.

Build layout: a parent aggregator POM at the root, com.ovenworks:bakeplan-parent:0.1.0, packaging pom, with bake-core and bake-planner as modules; bake-planner declares a dependency on bake-core so the reactor orders them correctly. Platform rules: every plugin and dependency version pinned exactly, managed once in the parent (pluginManagement/dependencyManagement), never repeated in the children — junit-jupiter 5.10.2 (the aggregate artifact, test scope; the core tests use @ParameterizedTest), maven-surefire-plugin 3.2.5, maven-compiler-plugin 3.15.0 on release 21, maven-resources-plugin 3.4.0. UTF-8 source encoding. A single `mvn -q test` at the ROOT must build both modules and run both suites — nobody here runs per-module commands.

The TODOs:
- bake-core, BatchMath.batchesForOrders(unitsOrdered, unitsPerBatch): batches needed to cover an order, partial batches round up, 0 ordered -> 0 batches. Reject unitsPerBatch < 1 with IllegalArgumentException 'unitsPerBatch must be positive' and negative orders with 'unitsOrdered must not be negative'.
- bake-planner, PurchasePlanner.plan(orders, recipes, wastePct): for each ordered product (skip zero-unit entries) find its Recipe — no recipe means IllegalArgumentException with message: no recipe for "focaccia" (the product name quoted). Batches come from BatchMath.batchesForOrders; each recipe ingredient contributes BatchMath.gramsWithWaste(gramsPerBatch, batches, wastePct) grams; sum per ingredient across products and emit one line per ingredient, alphabetical, formatted '<name>: <grams> g'. Empty or all-zero order book -> empty list.

The test files (bake-core/src/test/... and bake-planner/src/test/...) are the contract; leave them as they are. Done when `mvn -q test` from the root passes both modules; first build may fetch the pinned artifacts from Maven Central.
